name: Habanero Fire Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup red pepper flakes (or any red pepper, just for color)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the habaneros in a food processor.
2. Add some buttermilk and process again.
3. Add parsley and red pepper flakes and process again.
4. Add mayo and process again.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and top off with buttermilk until the processor is full. Process again.
6. This makes about a quart of sauce. It is incendiary.
